title: UWNet - Types of Access
body: UWNet SSID : UWNet Also known as: Aruba, New Wireless, Upgraded Wireless Locations: Campus buildings broadcasting the SSID of UWNet Includes NetID or guest login (replaces separate guest wireless system) Login Type Login Duration Intended Users NetID Remainder of the semester. Note : User remains authenticated for the remainder of the semester in Aruba buildings. UW-Madison faculty, staff, and students Email address 2 weeks (subject to change) Guests without NetIDs UWNet Legacy System SSID: UWNet- BuildingName Also known as: Cisco, classic wireless, legacy wireless Locations: Campus buildings broadcasting the SSID UWNet-BuildingName Login Type Login Duration Intended Users NetID Until user moves to a different building location UW-Madison faculty, staff, and students See Also UWNet - Log In to UWNet
